channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Trump lashes out at allies, says securing the Strait of Hormuz is ‘not for us’ - AP News
item.description:
1. Trump lashes out at allies, says securing the Strait of Hormuz is ‘not for us’  AP News
  2. Exclusive | Trump Tells Aides He’s Willing to End War Without Reopening Hormuz  WSJ
  3. Trump says US will leave Iran in 'two or three weeks' whether 'we have a deal or not'  BBC
  4. Live updates: President Trump will address the nation on the Iran war  AP News
  5. CNBC Daily Open: Markets rally as Trump signals Iran war could end soon  CNBC

item.title: American journalist Shelly Kittleson kidnapped in Baghdad - The Washington Post
item.description: American journalist Shelly Kittleson kidnapped in Baghdad  The Washington PostView Full Coverage on Google News

item.title: Top Brussels official urges Europeans to work from home and drive less - politico.eu
item.description:
1. Top Brussels official urges Europeans to work from home and drive less  politico.eu

  4. National fuel price measures threaten to worsen energy crisis, ministers told  Euractiv
  5. EU urges countries to remain aligned to cope with market volatility  Euronews.com

item.title: Israel to destroy 'all houses' near Lebanon border, defence minister says - Reuters

item.title: Russian Oil Exports Plunge as Drone Strikes Cripple Baltic Ports - Bloomberg.com
item.description:
1. Russian Oil Exports Plunge as Drone Strikes Cripple Baltic Ports  Bloomberg.com

  3. Russia says it will respond if Ukraine uses foreign airspace to attack its Baltic ports  Reuters
  4. Russia expected a windfall from soaring oil prices, but Ukrainian drones are devastating exports  Fortune
  5. Drones strike Russia’s Ust-Luga port again as EU officials visit Ukraine  Al Jazeera
